from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf

settings.write_text('{"service":{"host":"file","port":1}}', encoding='utf-8')
secrets.write_text('{"service":{"port":2,"token":"secret"}}', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=settings, secrets_files=secrets, envvar_prefix='MDU2')

failed_cases.description: Runtime set, update, and delete recursively merge dotted nested keys.
failed_cases.test_code:
import json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'service': {'host': 'base', 'pool': {'min': 1}}}, envvar_prefix='MDU4')
s.set('service.port', '2')
s.update({'SERVICE': {'pool': {'max': 4}}})
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict()['SERVICE'], sort_keys=True))
print(s.delete('service.pool.min'), s.exists('service.pool.min'), s.get('service.pool.max'))

    return settings.service.enabled and value == settings.service.port

print(s.service.tls_port, seen[0][1], seen[0][2], seen[0][3])
try:

failed_cases.description: reload drops runtime-only assignments while configure replaces source files.
failed_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
a = d / 'a.json'; b = d / 'b.json'
a.write_text('{"name":"one"}', encoding='utf-8')
b.write_text('{"name":"two"}', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=str(a), envvar_prefix='MDU11')
s.set('runtime', 'x')
s.reload()
print(s.name, s.exists('runtime'))
s.configure(settings_files=str(b), envvar_prefix='MDU11')
print(s.name)

failed_cases.description: Exporting as_dict to JSON and reloading preserves the canonical tree observed by validators and access projections.
failed_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'service': {'url': 'http://x', 'retries': 2}, 'features': {'beta': False}})
s.set('service.timeout', '@int 30')
s.update({'service': {'headers': {'x_trace': 'abc'}}})
exported = s.as_dict(); exported['SERVICE']['URL'] = 'copy-only'
p = d / 'roundtrip.json'
p.write_text(json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True), encoding='utf-8')
reloaded = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=str(p), validators=[Validator('service.timeout', is_type_of=int, condition=lambda value, settings: settings.service.retries == 2 and settings['features.beta'] is False)])
print(reloaded.service.url, reloaded['service.timeout'], type(reloaded.service.timeout).__name__, reloaded.get('service.headers.x_trace'), reloaded.features.beta)
print(json.dumps(reloaded.as_dict(), sort_keys=True) == json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True))

failed_cases.description: Source priority and recursive merge are preserved across reload while changed sources are observed and runtime-only state is dropped.
failed_cases.test_code:
import os, pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
for key in list(os.environ):
    if key.startswith('MDS3_'):
        del os.environ[key]
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
base = d / 'base.json'; local = d / 'local.json'; secrets = d / 'secrets.json'
base.write_text('{"database":{"host":"file1","port":1,"pool":{"min":1,"max":4}}}', encoding='utf-8')
local.write_text('{"database":{"port":2,"pool":{"max":8}},"feature":{"flag":false}}', encoding='utf-8')
secrets.write_text('{"database":{"password":"pw","port":4}}', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['MDS3_DATABASE__HOST'] = 'env-db'
os.environ['MDS3_DATABASE__POOL__MIN'] = '3'
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'database': {'engine': 'pg'}, 'feature': {'flag': True}}, settings_files=[str(base), str(local)], secrets_files=str(secrets), envvar_prefix='MDS3')
s.set('database.pool.max', 16)
s.set('runtime.only', 'x')
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict()['DATABASE'], sort_keys=True))
local.write_text('{"database":{"port":5,"pool":{"max":10}},"feature":{"flag":true}}', encoding='utf-8')
secrets.write_text('{"database":{"password":"pw2","port":6}}', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['MDS3_DATABASE__HOST'] = 'env-db2'
os.environ['MDS3_DATABASE__POOL__MIN'] = '7'
s.reload()
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict()['DATABASE'], sort_keys=True))
print(s.feature.flag, s.exists('runtime.only'))

failed_cases.description: Failed validated updates and failed explicit casts preserve the previous canonical tree across dot, item, and export views.
failed_cases.test_code:
import json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator, ValidationError, SettingsError
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'service': {'port': 8000, 'host': 'stable', 'enabled': True}, 'name': 'old'}, validators=[Validator('service.port', lt=9000, condition=lambda value, settings: settings.service.enabled and settings.service.host == 'stable')])
before = json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True)
try:
    s.update({'service': {'port': 99999, 'host': 'changed'}, 'name': 'new'}, validate=True)
except ValidationError:
    print('validation-error')
print(s.service.port, s['service.host'], s.name, json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True) == before)
try:
    s.update({'service': {'port': '@int nope'}, 'name': 'new'})
except SettingsError:
    print('cast-error')
print(s.get('service.port'), s.service.host, s['name'], json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True) == before)

all_cases.description: Nested defaults project consistently through attribute, item, dotted get, exists, and deep-copy export views.
all_cases.test_code:
import json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'Service': {'Url': 'http://x', 'Enabled': False, 'Limits': {'Zero': 0}}, 'Items': []}, envvar_prefix='MDU3')
print(s.service.url, s['SERVICE.LIMITS.ZERO'], s.get('service.enabled'))
print(s.exists('service.enabled'), s.exists('items'), s.exists('missing'))
copy = s.as_dict(); copy['SERVICE']['URL'] = 'copy-only'
print(s.service.url)
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True))
all_cases.expected_output:
http://x 0 False
True True False
http://x
{"ITEMS": [], "SERVICE": {"ENABLED": false, "LIMITS": {"ZERO": 0}, "URL": "http://x"}}
all_cases.actual:
http://x 0 False
True True False
http://x
{"ITEMS": [], "SERVICE": {"ENABLED": false, "LIMITS": {"ZERO": 0}, "URL": "http://x"}}
all_cases.expected:
http://x 0 False
True True False
http://x
{"ITEMS": [], "SERVICE": {"ENABLED": false, "LIMITS": {"ZERO": 0}, "URL": "http://x"}}

all_cases.description: TOML environment sections load default values before the active environment overlay.
all_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
p = d / 'settings.toml'
p.write_text('[default]\nname="base"\n[default.service]\nport=1\n[testing.service]\nport=2\nenabled=true\n', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=str(p), environments=True, env='testing', envvar_prefix='MDU5')
print(s.name, s.service.port, s.service.enabled)

all_cases.description: Environment variables use prefix filtering, double-underscore nesting, and automatic scalar/container casts.
all_cases.test_code:
import os, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
for key in list(os.environ):
    if key.startswith('MDU6_'):
        del os.environ[key]
os.environ['MDU6_SERVICE__ENABLED'] = 'false'
os.environ['MDU6_SERVICE__COUNT'] = '7'
os.environ['MDU6_SERVICE__RATIO'] = '1.5'
os.environ['MDU6_SERVICE__ITEMS'] = '[1,2]'
os.environ['OTHER_SERVICE__COUNT'] = '99'
s = MiniDynaconf(envvar_prefix='MDU6')
print(type(s.service.enabled).__name__, s.service.enabled)
print(type(s.service.count).__name__, s.service.count, type(s.service.ratio).__name__, s.service.ratio)
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict()['SERVICE'], sort_keys=True))

all_cases.description: Dotenv loading parses comments, quotes, prefixes, nesting, and casts in one env-loader primitive.
all_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
p = d / '.env'
p.write_text('# ignored\nMDU9_SERVICE__LABEL="quoted"\nMDU9_SERVICE__COUNT=3\nOTHER_VALUE=skip\n', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(envvar_prefix='MDU9')
s.load_env_file(str(p))
print(s.service.label, s.service.count, s.exists('other.value'))
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict()['SERVICE'], sort_keys=True))

all_cases.description: Malformed incremental file loads raise SettingsError without changing existing state.
all_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, SettingsError
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
bad = d / 'bad.json'
bad.write_text('{not-json', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'service': {'host': 'ok'}}, envvar_prefix='MDU10')
before = json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True)
try:
    s.load_file(str(bad), silent=False)
except SettingsError:
    print('bad-file')
print(s.service.host, json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True) == before)

all_cases.description: reload drops runtime-only assignments while configure replaces source files.
all_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
a = d / 'a.json'; b = d / 'b.json'
a.write_text('{"name":"one"}', encoding='utf-8')
b.write_text('{"name":"two"}', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=str(a), envvar_prefix='MDU11')
s.set('runtime', 'x')
s.reload()
print(s.name, s.exists('runtime'))
s.configure(settings_files=str(b), envvar_prefix='MDU11')
print(s.name)

all_cases.description: One merged configuration tree is projected consistently through dot access, item access, validator inputs, defaults, runtime writes, and export.
all_cases.test_code:
import os, pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator
for key in list(os.environ):
    if key.startswith('MDS1_'):
        del os.environ[key]
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
base = d / 'base.json'; local = d / 'local.json'; secrets = d / 'secrets.json'
base.write_text('{"service":{"host":"file","timeout":10},"database":{"host":"file-db","pool":{"max":4}}}', encoding='utf-8')
local.write_text('{"database":{"engine":"postgres","pool":{"min":2}}}', encoding='utf-8')
secrets.write_text('{"service":{"token":"secret"},"database":{"password":"pw"}}', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['MDS1_SERVICE__TIMEOUT'] = '20'
os.environ['MDS1_SERVICE__ENABLED'] = 'true'
os.environ['MDS1_DATABASE__PORT'] = '5433'
validators = [
    Validator('service.timeout', is_type_of=int, gte=20, condition=lambda value, settings: settings.service.enabled and settings['DATABASE.PORT'] == 5433 and settings.get('database.pool.min') == 2),
    Validator('service.region', default='us', is_type_of=str),
]
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'service': {'host': 'default', 'retries': 1}, 'database': {'engine': 'sqlite', 'pool': {'min': 1}}}, settings_files=[str(base), str(local)], secrets_files=str(secrets), envvar_prefix='MDS1', validators=validators)
s.set('service.host', 'runtime-host')
print(s.service.host, s['SERVICE.TIMEOUT'], s.get('service.token'), s.service.region)
print(s.database.port, s['database.engine'], s.get('database.pool.min'), s.get('database.pool.max'))
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True))

all_cases.description: Source priority and recursive merge are preserved across reload while changed sources are observed and runtime-only state is dropped.
all_cases.test_code:
import os, pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
for key in list(os.environ):
    if key.startswith('MDS3_'):
        del os.environ[key]
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
base = d / 'base.json'; local = d / 'local.json'; secrets = d / 'secrets.json'
base.write_text('{"database":{"host":"file1","port":1,"pool":{"min":1,"max":4}}}', encoding='utf-8')
local.write_text('{"database":{"port":2,"pool":{"max":8}},"feature":{"flag":false}}', encoding='utf-8')
secrets.write_text('{"database":{"password":"pw","port":4}}', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['MDS3_DATABASE__HOST'] = 'env-db'
os.environ['MDS3_DATABASE__POOL__MIN'] = '3'
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'database': {'engine': 'pg'}, 'feature': {'flag': True}}, settings_files=[str(base), str(local)], secrets_files=str(secrets), envvar_prefix='MDS3')
s.set('database.pool.max', 16)
s.set('runtime.only', 'x')
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict()['DATABASE'], sort_keys=True))
local.write_text('{"database":{"port":5,"pool":{"max":10}},"feature":{"flag":true}}', encoding='utf-8')
secrets.write_text('{"database":{"password":"pw2","port":6}}', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['MDS3_DATABASE__HOST'] = 'env-db2'
os.environ['MDS3_DATABASE__POOL__MIN'] = '7'
s.reload()
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict()['DATABASE'], sort_keys=True))
print(s.feature.flag, s.exists('runtime.only'))

all_cases.description: Failed validated updates and failed explicit casts preserve the previous canonical tree across dot, item, and export views.
all_cases.test_code:
import json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator, ValidationError, SettingsError
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'service': {'port': 8000, 'host': 'stable', 'enabled': True}, 'name': 'old'}, validators=[Validator('service.port', lt=9000, condition=lambda value, settings: settings.service.enabled and settings.service.host == 'stable')])
before = json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True)
try:
    s.update({'service': {'port': 99999, 'host': 'changed'}, 'name': 'new'}, validate=True)
except ValidationError:
    print('validation-error')
print(s.service.port, s['service.host'], s.name, json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True) == before)
try:
    s.update({'service': {'port': '@int nope'}, 'name': 'new'})
except SettingsError:
    print('cast-error')
print(s.get('service.port'), s.service.host, s['name'], json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True) == before)

8000 stable old True
cast-error
